qa_pairs.question: What are the general post-transfer activities users should complete after migrating data to a new Arbutus Cloud instance?
qa_pairs.answer: After transferring data to a new Arbutus Cloud instance, users should update firewall rules to accommodate new IP addresses, work with their DNS provider to update custom domain DNS entries, and update IP addresses within various configuration files.

qa_pairs.question: Can you provide examples of specific configuration files that may need to be updated due to new IP addresses after migrating data to a new Arbutus Cloud instance?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, specific configuration files that may need IP address updates after migrating data to a new Arbutus Cloud instance include `/etc/hosts`, `/etc/resolv.conf`, `/etc/haproxy/haproxy.cfg`, `/var/www/`, and `/var/lib/pgsql/data/pg_hba.conf`.
